can-you-ensure-all-test-20260411.goal: Ensure all benchmark test cases in benchmark/cases/f1040/2025/ are correct — inputs and expected outputs represent accurate 2025 tax year 1040 calculations. Verify against IRS rules, tax tables, and standard deductions for 2025.

work_packages.findings_summary: Cases 01,10,11: $0.50 phantom payments. Case 86: fed_withheld $72.85 mismatch. Case 09: missing OBBB senior deduction. Case 17: directory name says mfj but is single.
Cases 05,14,21: $0.50 phantom payments. Case 22: $0.22 phantom payment.

work_packages.description: SCHEDULE C / SE TAX / QBI — 11 cases
work_packages.findings_summary: Cases 07,15,32,33: $0.50 phantom payments. Case 108: scenario description wrong. Case 111: SEP input $5.42 off.
Case 122: DOB age 67 but no senior flag. Case 128: scenario text wrong SD. Case 60: floating point.

work_packages.description: EITC / CTC / ACTC FAMILY CREDITS — 9 cases
work_packages.findings_summary: Cases 12,24,29: $0.25-$0.50 phantom payments. Engine EITC income limits config too low.
Cases 08,41,44: $0.50-$1.00 phantom payments. Case 44: eitc_children input misleading.
CRITICAL: Wrong PTC applicable % table (cases 36,52,110). Wrong repayment caps. Cases 48,53: minor rounding.

work_packages.description: MISC CREDITS (HSA, savers, dep care, itemized, energy, foreign tax) — 13 cases
work_packages.findings_summary: Case 31: HSA double-deduction. Case 106: missing $215 ACTC. Saver's Credit config uses 2024 thresholds.

work_packages.description: COMPLEX MULTI-FORM CCH CASES (K-1, multiple 1099s) — 20 cases
work_packages.findings_summary: Case 95: missing 1099-MISC in inputs. Cases 70,95: Add Medicare Tax bundled in fed_withheld. Case 93: ODC not broken out.
Case 76: SALT cap not applied ($2034 error). Cases 67,84: $0.01 rounding.
